name: oit100_fixedbias
law: L = L_pcf98(w,N,D,mu) + kappa * (psi(D/mu) - psi(D_bar)) + lambda_tv * relu(nearest_train_TV(w)-r_tv)^2
notes: Same-mixture multiplier drops cancel exactly when D/mu is constant.
The center is the fixed canonical-token barycenter, not a fitted loss parameter.
The token potential is constant over mixtures at fixed N,D,mu; unbarriered mixture argmins match base pcf98.
The support barrier is zero on observed train and seed7 holdout mixtures.
